_README: Example MCP server config for MoMo stakeholders using prof-data-analyst plugin.
Drop into ~/.claude.json under the top-level 'mcpServers' key (user scope) — DO NOT commit secrets.
Alternatively use the CLI commands at the bottom (cleaner, no manual JSON edit).
After install: restart Claude Code, then verify with: `claude mcp list`
All 3 MCPs are OPTIONAL — install only the ones your team uses.
Non-MoMo users: ignore this file entirely. The plugin works without these.

momo-data._purpose: MoMo unified data MCP gateway. Bundles Semantic Cube + Data Portal + Journey Data + Apollo (mini-app trackify). See references/momo-extensions.md §2.
momo-data._replace_server_id: Replace <SERVER_ID> below with your team's MCP server ID provided by MoMo Data Platform team. Ping in Google Chat 'Claude With MoMo Data' group.

mimir-da-sql._purpose: Mimir NL→SQL agent (MoMo-specific). Optional. See references/momo-extensions.md §3a.
mimir-da-sql._install_note: Requires local Mimir client checkout + Python env. Replace <PATH_TO_MIMIR> with your local install path. Ping mimir-team for setup if not available.

powerbi-modeling._purpose: PowerBI Desktop model editing via TMDL/PBIP. Optional. Used by mode-report for PBI deliverables.
powerbi-modeling._install_note: Requires VSCode extension 'analysis-services.powerbi-modeling-mcp' installed. Adjust path to match your extension version.

_CLI_install_commands._note: Alternative to manual JSON edit — run these in PowerShell/bash to register MCPs at user scope.
_CLI_install_commands.momo-data: claude mcp add -s user momo-data -- cmd /c npx -y mcp-remote https://mdp-mcp-gateway.mservice.io/servers/<SERVER_ID>/mcp
_CLI_install_commands.mimir-da-sql: claude mcp add -s user mimir-da-sql -- python <PATH_TO_MIMIR>/mcp_server.py
_CLI_install_commands.powerbi-modeling: claude mcp add -s user powerbi-modeling -- C:\path\to\powerbi-modeling-mcp.exe --start --readwrite

_verify: After install: `claude mcp list` should show all 3 as ✓ Connected. If '✗ Failed to connect', check VPN (MoMo internal services need MoMo VPN) and that the server endpoint is reachable from your machine.
_security_notes: 1. NEVER commit a real SERVER_ID, mimir PATH, or PAT into a public repo.
2. SERVER_ID for momo-data is per-team — get yours from MoMo Data Platform team, do not share across teams.
3. Mimir + momo-data MCPs require MoMo VPN for endpoint reachability.
4. powerbi-modeling MCP touches local PBI Desktop files only; no remote auth.
